raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to tar.gz logs older than one day. Probably /var/log. Command: find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0 | tar -czvf logs.tar.gz --null -T - . But need to include path? Use -C /var/log? Let's produce: find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0 | tar -czvf logs.tar.gz --null -T - . But tar will include full path. Maybe use -C /var/log. So: find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0 | tar -czvf logs.tar.gz --null -T - -C /var/log . But that would add relative paths. Let's output.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need to tar.gz logs older than one day. Probably /var/log. Command: find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0 | tar -czvf logs.tar.gz --null -T - . So: find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0 | tar -czvf logs.tar.gz --null -T - -C /var/log . But that would add relative paths. Let's output.
